name: kimi-partner
description: Bring Kimi's frontend implementation and visual taste into a Codex-controlled workflow with scoped delegation and independent verification.

interface.shortDescription: Use Kimi's frontend taste while Codex keeps control and verification.
interface.longDescription: Kimi Partner brings Kimi's frontend implementation and visual judgment into a Codex-controlled local workflow. Codex scopes the task and writable files, Kimi implements the interface, and Codex reviews the Git diff, runs tests, returns evidence-backed feedback, and owns final browser acceptance.
defaultPrompt: Let Kimi implement this frontend task, then verify it yourself.
Ask Kimi for an alternative frontend version and compare the result.
